strings.tag: Hi [name], this is a test string from room005 - murphy's trailer.
What is your question?
You can collect evidence from the RV, but if you want something from Murphy personally, you must ask his permission.
Use the luminol in your field kit. Luminol is a chemical that glows greenish-blue when it comes in contact with blood.

Luminol reacts with the iron in blood to form excited ions that give off light. However, luminol is not specific for blood. It reacts with other things that contain iron, for example some types of bleach. So, be careful!
Simply click the luminol tool, and then click the suspicious areas where you think there might be blood.
Use your swabs to collect cheek cells.
Try using the impression materials and have people bite on it.
Are you sure? I think there is more work to do here.
Did you ask Mr. Murphy about the poison and did you collect evidence from him?
Did you use luminol to search for blood here? It will help us find the place where the death of the victim occurred.
I agree. Let's move on.
How do I collect evidence from Mr. Murphy?
How do I search for blood?
Why does it glow?
How do I use luminol?
I'll look for blood and other evidence, and talk with Mr. Murphy.
I think I'm done here.
How do I get a DNA sample?
How do I get a bite impression?
I'll keep investigating.
I'll go talk to him and collect the evidence.
I'll select the next location.
What are you doing here?
How can I help you?
Yes, I was shocked to learn about it. We were supposed to meet at 12:30 this afternoon.
About my job offer to him. Marco was a wonderful handler. I would have treated him much better than Ms. Ranger did.
Yes. Now that Apollo is missing, my Tobias will certainly be the champion in today's show!
I don't think it's necessary. I have nothing to do with Marco Williams' death.
Since this is dog show property, I guess there is nothing I can do to stop you.
It's a rat poison. Of course I used it to kill rats. What else would I use it for?
Why would I go there? I don't even like Ms. Ranger.
Well... I admit that it would help my dog's chances if Apollo got sick. But I didn't kill any dog or any person!
Take whatever you need. The evidence will support my story.
Have you heard about Marco Williams' death?
I need to search the RV.
May I collect some evidence from you?
Thank you for your cooperation.
Why were you meeting?
So, is that your dog over there?
What do you use this poison for?
Have you ever been to Ranger's RV?
If that's the case, why did we find your fingerprints on the spoon in her RV?
Well, we'll find that out. I need to collect some evidence from you.
I'm going to collect a DNA sample and a bite impression from you.
